final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing infographic explaining concept definitions and relationships between AI technologies.

Style/medium: hand-drawn illustration style, editorial infographic with sketched icons and casual typography, reminiscent of whiteboard explainer diagrams
Composition: vertical flowchart layout, top-to-bottom reading order, clear visual hierarchy with connecting arrows between concept nodes
Subject: six interconnected tech concepts — AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, 蒸馏, CLI — each represented with simple pictorial icons and brief definitions
Scene/backdrop: clean off-white paper texture background, subtle grid lines suggesting notebook paper, generous white space between elements
Color palette: limited palette of 3-4 soft colors (muted blue for AI, warm orange for Agent, sage green for CLI) with black ink outlines, hand-drawn aesthetic
Text (verbatim): "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: must be readable at thumbnail size; relationship arrows must clearly show hierarchy and dependencies; Chinese and English text must be legible
Avoid: photorealistic rendering; 3D effects; complex gradients; stock illustration style; cluttered layout; tiny unreadable text
